name: mem-forever
description: Every AI tool forgets you. This one doesn't. Ever. Auto-saves your preferences, decisions, and lessons to .ilang/ — survives every session, every tool, every migration.

hooks.prompt: mem-forever active. Check .ilang/ for uncommitted changes from previous session — if found, commit and push immediately. Then read .ilang/soul.md and .ilang/memory.md. If soul.md is empty or template-only, run onboarding: ask ONE question at a time, casual tone, cover role + work style + preferences. Create soul.md when you have enough. Never say 'DNA', 'gene', 'mutation', 'decay'. Say 'saved some notes' or 'I remember from last time'.

Session ending. Review this session for decisions, lessons, mistakes fixed, facts discovered. Append to .ilang/memory.md in format: ::DECIDED{}, ::LEARNED{}, ::FACT{}, ::PROGRESS{}. Update .ilang/soul.md if repeated patterns (3x+) or explicit rejections observed. Commit and push .ilang/ now.
Context compacting. Save all unsaved observations to .ilang/memory.md and .ilang/soul.md. Commit and push .ilang/ now. Compress: patterns not events, max 200 lines.
